Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.5.1/bin/Rscript.exe" -e "
devtools::load_all\(''C:/Users/Selçuk/Documents/GitHub/fastml''\)
data\(iris\)
iris <- iris[iris$Species != ''setosa'', ]
iris$Species <- factor\(iris$Species\)

model <- fastml\(
    data = iris,
    label = ''Species'',
    algorithms = ''rand_forest''
\)

# Check predictions structure
cat\(''\\n--- Predictions Structure ---\\n''\)
cat\(''Class of predictions:'', class\(model$predictions\), ''\\n''\)
cat\(''Names of predictions:'', names\(model$predictions\), ''\\n''\)
cat\(''Class of predictions[[1]]:'', class\(model$predictions[[1]]\), ''\\n''\)
if \(is.data.frame\(model$predictions[[1]]\)\) {
  cat\(''Predictions is a data.frame \(flat structure\)\\n''\)
  cat\(''Columns:'', paste\(names\(model$predictions[[1]]\), collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\)
} else {
  cat\(''Predictions is nested by engine\\n''\)
  cat\(''Engines:'', names\(model$predictions[[1]]\), ''\\n''\)
}

# Check best_model_name
cat\(''\\n--- Best Model Name ---\\n''\)
print\(model$best_model_name\)

# Try plot
cat\(''\\n--- Attempting Plots ---\\n''\)
tryCatch\({
  plot\(model, type = ''all''\)
  cat\(''Plot completed successfully!\\n''\)
}, error = function\(e\) {
  cat\(''Error:'', conditionMessage\(e\), ''\\n''\)
}\)
")

Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.5.1/bin/Rscript.exe" -e "tryCatch\({ parse\(file=''C:/Users/Selçuk/Documents/GitHub/fastml/R/train_models.R''\); cat\(''train_models.R: OK\\n''\) }, error=function\(e\) cat\(''train_models.R:'', e$message, ''\\n''\)\)")

Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.2/bin/Rscript.exe" -e "
devtools::load_all\(\)
set.seed\(123\)
data\(iris\)
iris2 <- iris[iris$Species != ''setosa'', ]
iris2$Species <- factor\(iris2$Species\)
result <- fastml\(
  data = iris2,
  label = ''Species'',
  algorithms = c\(''logistic_reg'', ''rand_forest''\),
  resampling_method = ''cv'',
  cv_folds = 3,
  test_size = 0.3,
  seed = 42,
  verbose = FALSE
\)
summary\(result\)
")

Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.2/bin/Rscript.exe" --vanilla -e "
library\(foreach\)
library\(doFuture\)
library\(future\)

# Helper functions needed
fastml_normalize_threads <- function\(n\) if \(is.numeric\(n\) && n >= 1\) as.integer\(n\) else 1L
fastml_normalize_seed <- function\(s\) if \(is.numeric\(s\)\) as.integer\(s\) else NULL

# Load the function
source\(''C:/Users/Selcuk/Documents/GitHub/fastml/R/parallel_utils.R''\)

# Check initial backend
cat\(''Initial backend:'', getDoParName\(\), ''\\n''\)

# Setup parallel
ctx <- fastml_setup_parallel\(n_cores = 2, seed = 123\)
cat\(''After setup:'', getDoParName\(\), ''\\n''\)

# Restore
ctx[[''restore'']]\(\)
cat\(''After restore:'', getDoParName\(\), ''\\n''\)

cat\(''\\nTest passed\\n''\)
")
